message:
chore: sync beads issue state and e2e playbook documentation

Update .beads/issues.jsonl with latest issue metadata and add new
content to the e2e testing playbook documentation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.4","title":"task(rescale): enforce full-repaint boundaries and diff-baseline reset across geometry transitions","description":"Guarantee that geometry-changing transitions cannot apply stale incremental diffs by enforcing full repaint boundaries and clear baseline semantics.","acceptance_criteria":"1) No stale-diff artifacts when cols/rows or pixel geometry change.\n2) Tests validate clean behavior through rapid grow/shrink oscillations.\n3) JSONL traces include explicit markers for baseline reset/full repaint boundaries.","notes":"Coordinate with ftui-web patch pipeline semantics and stale-diff safeguards.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"PurpleFinch","estimated_minutes":180,"created_at":"2026-02-13T01:40:48.964268494Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-18T21:46:24.002010154Z","closed_at":"2026-02-18T21:46:24.001989496Z","close_reason":"Completed: explicit geometry-transition baseline reset/full repaint boundaries, structured reset markers, and resize oscillation stale-diff tests","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["diff","patches","render","resize"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:40:48.964268494Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:40:52.903164805Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:40:53.306720884Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.5","title":"task(rescale): harden pointer/mouse/touch coordinate mapping during active rescale","description":"Ensure hit-testing and input coordinate transforms stay correct while geometry changes are in-flight, including touch pinch and wheel interactions.","acceptance_criteria":"1) Input coordinates remain within valid grid bounds during/after rescale transitions.\n2) No stuck drag/capture states due to mid-resize geometry changes.\n3) Browser E2E covers mouse/touch/wheel interleavings with deterministic assertions.","notes":"Focus on mapping via live canvas rect + current grid with deterministic clamp policy.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":180,"created_at":"2026-02-13T01:40:49.718415909Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T06:54:56.230984154Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T06:54:56.230965760Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["coordinates","input","resize","web"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.5","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:40:49.718415909Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.5","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:40:53.731892052Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1187,"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"LilacBison: Implemented CoordinateGuard in frankenterm-web/src/coordinate_guard.rs. Validated cell coordinates with exact/clamped resolution, geometry-versioned stale detection, pixel→cell and CSS→cell transforms with DPR handling. 37 tests, all 469 frankenterm-web tests pass.","created_at":"2026-02-13T06:54:51Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.6","title":"task(rescale-test): add browser resize-storm E2E scripts with verbose JSONL evidence","description":"Implement canonical resize-storm scripts that drive mixed resize/DPR/zoom/font events and assert geometry/frame-hash invariants.","acceptance_criteria":"1) New/updated scripts run in CI and locally with deterministic seeds.\n2) Logs include per-event geometry snapshots, frame hashes, and failure reproduction command.\n3) Suite catches regressions for previously observed rescale bugs.","notes":"Script outputs must be replayable and schema-stable.

Update 2026-02-19 (SapphireMeadow/Codex):
- Upgraded tests/e2e/scenarios/remote/resize_storm.json from simple resize sequence to mixed-signal deterministic storm coverage with explicit DPR-shift, zoom-change, font-reload, same-size resize boundary, and extreme-size probes.
- Added scenario fixture categories and assertion set that validates start/end sentinels, signal markers, and geometry probes for key transitions (80x24, 120x40 same-size, 1x1, 300x100, final 80x24).
- Reworked tests/e2e/scripts/test_remote_resize_storm.sh into a full evidence gate:
  - ws_client self-tests preflight
  - fail-fast bridge startup + reproducible command output
  - transcript marker validation
  - JSONL invariants for correlation_id, run_start/run_end, resize input geometry/hash_key integrity, frame hash presence, and deterministic timestamp format
  - report artifact emission at /tmp/ftui_e2e_logs/remote_resize_storm/resize_storm_report.json including repro command and artifact paths.
- Wired suite into tests/e2e/scripts/run_all.sh as remote_resize_storm.

Verification:
- tests/e2e/scripts/test_remote_resize_storm.sh passed with deterministic outcome and assertions (20 frames, 13 assertions, 0 failures).
- bash -n tests/e2e/scripts/test_remote_resize_storm.sh passed.
- bash -n tests/e2e/scripts/run_all.sh passed.
- rch exec -- cargo fmt --check passed.
- rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets passed.
- rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings passed.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"Codex","estimated_minutes":210,"created_at":"2026-02-13T01:40:50.581107390Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-19T02:25:53.712963817Z","closed_at":"2026-02-19T02:25:53.712940584Z","close_reason":"Completed: deterministic mixed-signal resize-storm E2E with JSONL geometry/frame invariants, repro report, and run_all wiring","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e","logging","resize","web"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:40:50.581107390Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:40:54.189593668Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:40:54.659801874Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:42:55.292634468Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.7","title":"task(rescale-diff): cross-browser differential checks for geometry and interaction parity","description":"Run deterministic scenario corpus across browser targets and compare geometry/interactions to detect browser-specific divergence early.","acceptance_criteria":"1) Differential harness reports actionable diffs with minimized repro artifacts.\n2) Known acceptable divergences are documented with explicit rationale.\n3) CI warns/fails on new unexplained divergence classes.","notes":"Prioritize Safari + Chromium parity for resize and DPR transitions.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":180,"created_at":"2026-02-13T01:40:51.333439816Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-19T06:12:19.754039077Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["chrome","differential","firefox","safari","web"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.7","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:40:51.333439816Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.7","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:40:55.110815606Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.7","title":"task(rescale-diff): cross-browser differential checks for geometry and interaction parity","description":"Run deterministic scenario corpus across browser targets and compare geometry/interactions to detect browser-specific divergence early.","acceptance_criteria":"1) Differential harness reports actionable diffs with minimized repro artifacts.\n2) Known acceptable divergences are documented with explicit rationale.\n3) CI warns/fails on new unexplained divergence classes.","notes":"Prioritize Safari + Chromium parity for resize and DPR transitions.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":180,"created_at":"2026-02-13T01:40:51.333439816Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-19T06:17:48.864113759Z","closed_at":"2026-02-19T06:17:48.864093662Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["chrome","differential","firefox","safari","web"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.7","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:40:51.333439816Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.7","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:40:55.110815606Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.8","title":"task(rescale-fix): implement concrete fix set for current web rescale glitch reports","description":"Implement the concrete fix set derived from deterministic repro traces for currently observed web rescale glitches (garbled/noisy grid, transient geometry drift, stale visual state under resize/zoom/font events). This is the integration-focused fix bead bridging diagnosis to regression validation.","acceptance_criteria":"1) Reported rescale glitches are eliminated in deterministic repro corpus scenarios.\n2) Fixes cover host orchestration + wasm geometry/fit integration boundaries as required by evidence.\n3) Unit/integration tests guard each fixed failure mode.\n4) Structured logs prove invariant restoration (geometry continuity, frame hash stability, interaction correctness).","notes":"Primary hotspots to evaluate and patch as needed:
- frankentui_showcase_demo.html resize orchestration around lines ~436-470 and ~652-665.
- crates/frankenterm-web/src/wasm.rs fit_to_container/set_scale/input handling around lines ~553-581 and ~626+.
- crates/frankenterm-web/src/wasm.rs sync_canvas_css_size around lines ~290-317.
- ftui-web patch baseline behavior around stale diff fallback in crates/ftui-web/src/lib.rs lines ~431-434.

Update 2026-02-19 (SapphireMeadow/Codex):
- Implemented deterministic geometry coalescing + signature-based resize in frankentui_showcase_demo.html with frame-tick application, structured JSONL resize records, and unified queueing from ResizeObserver/visualViewport/orientation/zoom paths.
- Hardened ftui-web same-size resize handling in crates/ftui-web/src/step_program.rs to force repaint boundaries for DPR/zoom/fit transitions even when cols/rows are unchanged.
- Added regression test same_size_resize_still_forces_repaint_boundary validating full-repaint hint and geometry-transition markers for same-size resize events.
- Verified with rch: cargo fmt --check, cargo check --workspace --all-targets, cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings, and targeted test for the new regression.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":210,"created_at":"2026-02-13T01:42:52.968559084Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-19T02:09:56.586964682Z","closed_at":"2026-02-19T02:09:56.586942942Z","close_reason":"Completed: deterministic resize orchestration + same-size full-repaint boundary + regression test + rch verification","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["bugfix","resize","showcase","wasm","web"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.8","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:42:52.968559084Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.8","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:42:53.724701836Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.8","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:42:54.104974945Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.8","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:42:54.487679738Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.8","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.15.1.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:42:54.905752813Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2vr05.15.2","title":"feature(text-layout): TeX-class paragraph breaking, leading, and justification (incremental + deterministic)","description":"Goal\n- Implement a real-time paragraph layout core that delivers TeX-class text quality while preserving deterministic behavior and frame budgets.\n\nScope\n- Explicit quality objective (badness/demerits) and constraint system.\n- Incremental Knuth-Plass style line breaking suitable for live edits/resizes.\n- Leading/baseline-grid model and paragraph spacing policy.\n- Hyphenation and penalty tuning with deterministic dictionaries/configuration.\n- Policy presets and fallback modes for constrained environments.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria\n- Paragraph layout quality objective is documented, implemented, and test-covered.\n- Incremental layout updates avoid full-paragraph recomputation for local edits/resizes.\n- Justified output quality is measurably improved versus greedy baseline while preserving determinism.\n- Unit/property tests and browser/fixture E2E scenarios validate correctness under multilingual and edge-case inputs.","notes":"Execution Notes\n- Separate semantic correctness from quality optimization so fallbacks preserve meaning/cursor semantics even when quality tier drops.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","estimated_minutes":1500,"created_at":"2026-02-13T01:40:40.084962777Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T01:40:40.572584502Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["hyphenation","justification","layout","linebreak","text","typography"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.15.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.15","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:40:40.084962777Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2vr05.15.2.1","title":"task(layout-core): define formal paragraph objective (badness/demerits/constraints) and invariants","description":"Specify objective function and constraints for line-breaking/justification from first principles, including penalties for rivers, widow/orphan lines, stretch/compress bounds, and readability guards.","acceptance_criteria":"1) Objective function and invariants are explicit and implementable.\n2) Golden examples demonstrate expected decision outcomes.\n3) Unit tests validate cost component monotonicity and deterministic tie-breaks.","notes":"This is the contract that prevents heuristic drift and hidden quality regressions.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":180,"created_at":"2026-02-13T01:40:55.552648324Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T06:36:45.142835767Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T06:36:45.142806021Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["layout","math","typography"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.15.2.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.15.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:40:55.552648324Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1184,"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.15.2.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"LilacBison: Implemented formal paragraph objective in ftui-text/src/wrap.rs. Added FitnessClass, BreakKind, BreakPenalty, ParagraphObjective with badness/demerits/adjacency/widow/orphan methods. terminal() and typographic() presets. 24 unit tests, all 674 ftui-text tests pass.","created_at":"2026-02-13T06:36:40Z"}]}

@@ -197,6 +197,35 @@ Other useful suites:
 - `tests/e2e/scripts/test_paste.sh`
 - `tests/e2e/scripts/test_kitty_keyboard.sh`
 
+## Remote Resize-Storm Cross-Browser Differential
+
+Use this suite to compare deterministic resize-storm traces across browser targets
+and fail on unexplained divergence classes.
+
+```bash
+# Local default (warn on unknown divergences)
+tests/e2e/scripts/test_remote_resize_storm_cross_browser_diff.sh
+
+# CI-style strict mode
+E2E_DIFF_MODE=strict tests/e2e/scripts/test_remote_resize_storm_cross_browser_diff.sh
+
+# Select browser labels
+E2E_DIFF_BROWSERS=chromium,webkit,firefox \
+  tests/e2e/scripts/test_remote_resize_storm_cross_browser_diff.sh
+```
+
+Controls:
+
+- `E2E_DIFF_BROWSERS` — comma-separated browser labels (minimum 2)
+- `E2E_DIFF_MODE` — `warn` (default local) or `strict` (default in CI)
+- `E2E_DIFF_USE_EXISTING_ARTIFACTS=1` — reuse existing per-browser JSONL traces
+- `E2E_DIFF_KNOWN_DIVERGENCES` — path to approved divergence TSV
+- `E2E_DIFF_REPORT_OUT` — output JSON report path
+
+Known divergence policy file:
+
+- `tests/e2e/fixtures/remote_resize_storm_known_divergences.tsv`
+
 ## Troubleshooting
 
 - **Missing python**: ensure `python3` is available.
